name: Sun-Dried Tomato Aioli
recipeIngredient: Salt and fresh ground white pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop sun-dried tomatoes in a food processor.
2. Add egg, garlic, mustard, and lemon juice to the food processor and blend well.
3. With the machine running, gradually add olive oil through the feed tube in a slow, steady stream.
4. Blend until smooth and thick.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
- This recipe can be prepared up to 2 days ahead. Refrigerate when finished.
